productDisplayName: New Balance MC900 Men Others Tennis White Sports Shoes
description: Stay light and agile in the new balance MC900WT, an ultra-lightweight tennis shoe built on a neutral platform. Upper Breathable mesh upper Lightweight synthetic overlays Welded seams minimize likelihood of irritation and reduce overall weight N-LOCK external support system ensures a snug, secure Fit Lightly padded tongue and collar for added comfort Midsole ACTEVA LITE midsole provides supreme compression resistance and is 24% lighter than a standard midsole foam ABZORB heel cushioning for maximum shock absorption Outsole Blown rubber outsole offers lightweight cushioning and flexibility Ndurance rubber material delivers optimal durability in high-wear areas of the outsole Built on a PL-1 last with an anatomically designed heel cup, low instep, reduced toe depth and narrower width Shoe care Brush surface with a soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash Do not store in direct sunlight
